name: Songlink / Odesli API
description: The Songlink/Odesli API allows you to look up a song, album, or artist across multiple streaming platforms. Given a URL from any supported platform (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, Deezer, Tidal, etc.), it returns links to the same content on all other supported platforms. Useful for creating universal music sharing links.
